texto: Every girl's beauty, whether it's inside or outside is a masterpiece.

texto: People don't die, they continue to live. As long as you remember who they are when they're still living. See? Now that you've think about it, you thought about those who passed away and see them moving in your memories. That's right. They're still alive as long as you live. They only die when you can't remember them, and when the time comes you're dead too. Memories are the the real people.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Riki Jou que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “People don't die, they continue to live. As long as you remember who they are when they're still …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, life-lessons, people, com foco em reflexao.
